headline: Digital Realty Targets Nearly S$7 Billion Investment to Strengthen Singapore as Asia Pacific AI Hub
summary: Planned data center expansion, workforce growth, and new innovation capabilities position Singapore as a critical base for production-scale AISINGAPORE, April 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR), the world's largest cloud- and carrier-neutral data center platform, today announced it is targeting nearly S$7 billion of total investment in Singapore, reinforcing the market's critical role as an AI infrastructure hub for Asia Pacific, with more than S$4.3 billion planned for new
